sidebar.hideProjectsWithoutActiveTasksDescriptio: Filters the sidebar to projects with at least one visible, non-archived task, keeping project navigation focused on current work.
sidebar.sortNeedsReviewLastDescription: When enabled, tasks marked as unread (read later) sink to the bottom of their group, keeping actionable tasks on top.
sidebar.expressModeDescription: When enabled, clicking the “+” on a project creates a task instantly using defaults (default branch + last-used agent), skipping the home configuration panel. Run the home flow once first so the defaults are populated.

home.reviewStrategySameBranchDesc: A and B share the current branch. Best when the loop should directly refine the working tree.
home.reviewStrategyNewBranchDesc: A and B share one isolated review branch while keeping {{branch}} clean.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Lifetime activity across all tasks and sessions — token burn parsed from agent transcripts.
usage.empty: No usage data yet — run some agent sessions first.
usage.loadingHint: First load parses all session history — this can take a moment.

caliber.tasks: How it's counted: tasks with a non-null archive date (archiving is the completion act). The sub-line is all tasks ever created.
caliber.tokens: How it's counted: parsed from local Claude / Codex session transcripts. Total = input + output + cache read + cache write. Other runtimes have no transcript reader and count as zero.
caliber.lines: How it's counted: per task = committed diff vs source branch (merge-base) + uncommitted working-tree changes. Live for active tasks; archived tasks use their last snapshot (tasks archived before this feature shipped have none and count as zero).
caliber.activeDays: How it's counted: local calendar days with any token usage in session transcripts.
caliber.heatmap: How it's counted: each session's tokens are bucketed into the local date they were consumed. Color levels are quantiles (25/50/75) of non-zero days.
caliber.byRuntime: How it's counted: grouped by the runtime that ran each session; only sessions with parseable transcripts are included.
caliber.bySource: How it's counted: the account mode recorded when each session was spawned. Sessions from before tracking landed are attributed to the runtime's current setting (estimate).
caliber.topTasks: How it's counted: sum of all session tokens per task, top 10.
